creator: gelonnov@gmail.com
text:
net/ntpsec NTS protocol does not work without the -d flag.

rc.conf
ntpd_flags=" -d -l /var/log/ntpd.log -p /var/run/ntpd.pid"

ntpq -p
     remote                                   refid      st t when poll reach   delay   offset   jitter
=======================================================================================================
+time.cloudflare.com                     10.71.14.51      3 8  913 1024  377  91.1701 -15.6517  11.9831
*sth-ts.nts.netnod.se                    96.180.207.109   2 8  849 1024  177  71.6589 -14.8252  11.9947
+ntp1.glypnod.com                        64.142.122.37    2 8  984 1024  375 263.0052  -7.7566  13.3473
+ntp2.glypnod.com                        193.62.22.74     2 8  187 1024  377  96.7587 -28.8859  16.3265

ntpq -c nts
NTS client sends:            931
NTS client recvs good:       812
NTS client recvs w error:    0
NTS server recvs good:       0
NTS server recvs w error:    0
NTS server sends:            0
NTS make cookies:            0
NTS decode cookies:          0
NTS decode cookies old:      0
NTS decode cookies too old:  0
NTS decode cookies error:    0
NTS KE probes good:          10
NTS KE probes_bad:           0
NTS KE serves good:          0
NTS KE serves_bad:           0


rc.conf
ntpd_flags="-l /var/log/ntpd.log -p /var/run/ntpd.pid"

ntpq -p
     remote                                   refid      st t when poll reach   delay   offset   jitter
=======================================================================================================
 time.cloudflare.com                     .NTS.           16 u    -  68m    0   0.0000   0.0000   0.0005
 nts.ntp.se                              .NTS.           16 u    -  68m    0   0.0000   0.0000   0.0005
 ntp1.glypnod.com                        .NTS.           16 u    -  68m    0   0.0000   0.0000   0.0005
 ntp2.glypnod.com                        .NTS.           16 u    -  68m    0   0.0000   0.0000   0.0005

ntpq -c nts
NTS client sends:            0
NTS client recvs good:       0
NTS client recvs w error:    0
NTS server recvs good:       0
NTS server recvs w error:    0
NTS server sends:            0
NTS make cookies:            0
NTS decode cookies:          0
NTS decode cookies old:      0
NTS decode cookies too old:  0
NTS decode cookies error:    0
NTS KE probes good:          0
NTS KE probes_bad:           4
NTS KE serves good:          0
NTS KE serves_bad:           0
